title: Run
description: A single agent run inside a workspace or sandbox. A Run records which spec it targeted, which agent executed it, what inputs were supplied, what events fired, what outputs landed, what it cost, and (optionally) the replay-equivalence evidence — prompt/tool-schema hashes, determinism knobs, checkpoint and sandbox refs, gate rollup. Runs are the join key between Decisions and Artifacts, and the source from which review packets (see trace-to-eval-harness/schemas/run-evidence.schema.json) are derived.

id.description: Stable run identifier, unique within the producing repo.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the executing agent. Example: claude-opus-4-7 or codex-cli.

runtime.description: Runtime environment label. Example: claude-code-cli, codex-cli, github-actions, vercel-build.

workspace_id.description: Identifier of the workspace or sandbox the run executed inside.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run finished. Omitted while the run is still in progress.

inputs.description: Inputs supplied to the run. Each entry is a kind tag plus an opaque ref.

kind.description: Input category. Example: prompt, file, url, dataset.

ref.description: Pointer to the input (path, URL, or id).

events.description: Timeline of notable events during the run.

kind.description: Event type. Example: tool_call, tool_result, gate_check, human_intervention, error.

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Schema varies by kind; consumers must dispatch on kind.

outputs.description: Artifacts the run produced. Each entry references an Artifact by id.

type.description: Optional cached copy of the artifact type for quick scanning.

cost.description: Resource cost of the run. Optional but recommended for any run that calls a paid model.

tokens_input.description: Total input tokens consumed across all model calls in this run.

tokens_output.description: Total output tokens emitted across all model calls in this run.

dollars_estimated.description: Estimated dollar cost of the run, computed from the token counts and the model's posted rates.

prompt_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonicalized prompt(s) that drove this run. Lets a reviewer prove two runs had identical prompt preconditions.

tool_schemas_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonicalized list of tool schemas available to the agent at run start. Lets a reviewer prove two runs had identical tool surfaces.

determinism.description: Reproducibility knobs in effect for this run. Absence means the run was not pinned for determinism.

checkpoint_ref.description: Opaque reference (path or URI) to a serialized RunState/checkpoint that could resume this run.

sandbox_image_ref.description: Opaque reference (path or URI or image digest) to a frozen sandbox image associated with this run.

gate_results_summary.description: Rollup of gate-check outcomes for this run. Detailed per-gate records live in events[] with kind=gate_check.

systems_map.description: What underlying system or mechanism does this run expose or change? Names the systemic pattern, not just the local concern. Recommended for substantive runs; see DEC-CDCP-020 for the discipline.

transferable_principle.description: What generalizes beyond this specific run? Names the principle that applies in other contexts or repos. Recommended; see DEC-CDCP-020.

falsification_test.description: What observation or experiment would prove this run's claims wrong? Names the empirical condition that would invalidate the run. Recommended; see DEC-CDCP-020.

adoption_ladder.description: Stepwise adoption from minimum viable to full, with monitoring signals at each step. Recommended; see DEC-CDCP-020.
